title: Pink Christmas Decorations – 12PCS Hanging Snowflakes Pink Baubles for Christmas Tree Decorations, 10cm Glitter Snowflake Xmas Baubles Ornaments for Tree Xmas Hanging Decoration
features: Pink Christmas Baubles Package - Includes 12 reusable Pink snowflake ornaments in 3 elegant designs, each measuring 10cm/3.94inch. Crafted from lightweight plastic with glitter coating, these Shatterproof snowflake Christmas hanging decorations are both durable and dazzling.

Pink Glitter Snowflake Decorations - Add a touch of winter sparkle to your festive home with these Pink Christmas decorations. Each hanging snowflake shimmers beautifully under lights, creating a stunning frosty look that perfectly complements your Christmas tree decorations.

Easy to Hang Anywhere - Each Christmas tree decorations Pink snowflake comes with hanging string, making it simple to hang on your Christmas tree, windows, garlands or ceilings. Quick to use, easy to remove – decorate your home in minutes.

Reusable & Long-Lasting Quality -Made of premium plastic with a firm glitter finish, these Pink Xmas tree decorations are waterproof, sturdy and reusable year after year. A sustainable way to enjoy festive sparkle without mess or waste.

Ideal for Multiple Occasions - Perfect as Christmas ornaments for tree or as elegant snowflake decorations for parties, weddings and winter events. Suitable for both indoor and outdoor use, creating a magical festive atmosphere anywhere.
description: Product Description AMLOOPH Christmas ornaments for tree or as elegant snowflake decorations for parties, weddings and winter events. Each Color Christmas Snowflake Baubles set includes 12 reusable snowflake ornaments in 3 elegant designs. Each color set includes 12 snowflake pieces: 3 designs × 4 pieces per design. Every snowflake measures 10cm/3.94inch. Crafted from lightweight plastic with glitter coating. These Shatterproof Gold snowflake Christmas hanging decorations are both durable and dazzling.
